result:
## The Quiet Apocalypse: On the Unnoticed End of Shared Reality

We are living through an apocalypse. Not the kind with fireballs and zombies, nor the slow-motion climate catastrophe that rightly haunts our news cycles. This is a quieter, more insidious unraveling. It is the end of shared reality. We have not merely entered an age of disagreement, which is the eternal human condition, but an age of profound epistemological fracture. The foundational premise
